description: Reviewed intentional old-vs-Go response diffs for winzy.ai-rdc7.12 phase 2. Seeded from module-bead candidates (rdc7.5 / rdc7.6 / rdc7.7). Entries with response_surface=false document behavioral divergences that may not appear as golden JSON field diffs; they never auto-pass unexplained diffs. NEW response-surface findings must be PM-approved before status becomes approved.

entries.old_shape: CDR range-lookup failure still persists the processed completion date (end-of-handler SaveChanges)
entries.new_shape: CDR range-lookup failure skips WITHOUT consuming the processed date
entries.justification: Strictly safer than C#; documented deliberate divergence on winzy.ai-rdc7.5

entries.old_shape: C# model binder behavior for unparseable since/page/pageSize (service-specific)
entries.new_shape: Go silent fallback / social-module convention for unparseable query params
entries.justification: Deferred at rdc7.5 review — do not guess; surface concrete field diffs from the Go run as findings before approving a response-surface entry

entries.old_shape: deviceId stored/compared without Go-side trim semantics
entries.new_shape: deviceId trim micro-divergence (empty → NULL; whitespace handling)
entries.justification: Accepted on winzy.ai-rdc7.6 review; device register responses are null-bodied in goldens so this may not surface as a JSON field diff
Frontend-opaque cursor; both normalize to {{timestamp}} under shape-based masking, so a live field diff here would mean one side left the timestamp regex — report before approving

entries.old_shape: DateTimeOffset.TryParse accepts a wider set of cursor strings
entries.new_shape: Go stricter cursor parse (invalid → 400 Invalid cursor format)
entries.justification: Documented rdc7.7 allowlist candidate; goldens already expect 400 + Invalid cursor format for garbage cursors

entries.old_shape: C# skip-both on key conflict during idempotent replay
entries.new_shape: Go heal path attempts key2 when key1 exists (recovers orphans)
entries.justification: Deliberate commented divergence on winzy.ai-rdc7.7; internal write-path — unlikely to alter golden-normalized feed item shapes

entries.old_shape: C# logging behavior on missing/unparseable habitId
entries.new_shape: Go warn-log on missing habitId (entry still dropped for friends)
entries.justification: Log-only divergence; no response-body surface expected

entries.old_shape: ASP.NET ValidationProblem includes type/title/status beside errors
entries.justification: ASP.NET ProblemDetails envelope; frontend mapHttpError reads only .errors (PM-verified). Approved 2026-07-12 (F1). Scoped to validation scenarios so 429 ProblemDetails are not silently swallowed.
Same as validation-envelope-keys (F1 companion path).

entries.new_shape: Go omits body status (HTTP status still 400)
entries.justification: Same as validation-envelope-keys (F1 companion path).

entries.old_shape: ASP.NET ValidationProblem includes type/title/status beside errors
entries.justification: F1 companion for auth-password-change.
F1 companion for auth-password-change.
F1 companion for auth-password-change.
Client keys 401 behavior purely on status (PM-verified client.ts). Approved 2026-07-12 (F2).
User-facing export; explicit empties are benign and match OpenAPI. Approved 2026-07-12 (F3).
Same as export-empty-collections-present (F3 companion path).

entries.old_shape: point-in-time stored name (often null on user.registered)
entries.new_shape: read-time auth.BatchProfiles join returns current displayName
entries.justification: Known rdc7.7 design; shape identical. Approved 2026-07-12 (F6b). F6a ordering is a harness sort, not allowlisted.

Same class as F1/F2 — ProblemDetails vs Go {error}. Frontend maps 429 to a hardcoded message keyed on status only (client.ts mapHttpError:121-123); retry path never parses the body. Approved 2026-07-12 (F7). Scoped via when_status=429 to all rate-limited endpoints.
F7 companion path (when_status=429).
F7 companion path (when_status=429).
F7 companion path (when_status=429).
